name: tissue-desktop
description: Electron desktop wrapper for Tissue (FastAPI + React)
// DESKTOP-MODIFIED: added build:backend and included it in the full production build

scripts.dev: npm run sync:version && npm run build:electron && concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run watch:electron" "npm run start:electron:dev"
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev -- --mode desktop
scripts.build: npm run sync:version && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --config electron/builder.config.cjs
